description: This file defines a SettingsScreen widget for a Flutter app, providing a UI to configure appearance themes and customer account ID, leveraging provider for state management.

classes.name: SettingsScreen
classes.description: A Flutter widget representing the settings screen where users can change appearance and customer information.

classes.name: _SettingsScreenState
classes.description: State class managing the state of SettingsScreen, including controllers and widget build logic.

methods.name: createState
methods.description: Creates the mutable state for SettingsScreen widget.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the TextEditingController when the widget is removed.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the settings screen, including theme selection and customer ID input.
